title: No-account offline PWA: practice / mock-test / flashcard modes + persistent non-official labels
context: Delivery means a free, offline, accessible practice surface with no accounts, no PII, no ads. The PWA gives learners practice, mock-test, and flashcard modes with persistent non-official/non-advice labeling on every screen.
objective: Ship the no-account offline PWA with practice/mock-test/flashcard modes, local-only progress, and persistent non-official labels, meeting initial WCAG 2.2 AA.
acceptanceCriteria: Requires no account, collects no PII, stores progress local-device only, works offline, runs no ads

Practice mode gives immediate feedback + cited rationale; mock-test mode labels its score 'practice-only, not an official score'; persistent 'not official / not advice / verify with USCIS' labeling on every screen
Meets initial WCAG 2.2 AA (keyboard + screen-reader usable)
